exact_wording: PrimeReplace Atlas enumerates transcript-unit replacement opportunity across 5,738 ClinVar/MANE/GENCODE-linked mapped genes.
The all-mapped layer remaps 346,444 ClinVar P/LP gene-variant rows.
not_allowed_extension: do not call these patients or unique individuals

exact_wording: 3,459 genes were flagged as low-record-burden interpretation-limited.

exact_wording: The previous 306-gene set is retained as a curated display, benchmark, and high-detail subset.
not_allowed_extension: do not call it the full enumeration denominator

exact_wording: PA-Exact is retained as an evidence-burden and claim-boundary gate.

not_allowed_extension: never imply efficiency from coverage/donor size

exact_wording: ClinVar record coverage is not patient coverage.

exact_wording: No global total score or therapeutic ranking is produced.
